name: Test This Page
description: Runs the testing-plan for one page: reads the sibling 'Testing Plan.md', executes each stable-ID test, writes results to 'Test Results/<date>.md', diffs against the previous run, and flags regressions. One agent, one shot.

data.label: Run testing plan
data.prompt: Read /root/projects/outreach-dashboard/{{page_path}} — Testing Plan.md. Execute each stable-ID test. Write results to {{page_path}} — Test Results/{{date}}.md. Diff vs the previous run; flag regressions. Return a one-paragraph summary + counts (passed/failed/regressions).
